title: Packit/TMT: Exclude podman packages from podman-next for tests
body:
See individual commits.

comments.body: let me check if dnf exclusion can solve this issue for good.
[NON-BLOCKING] Packit jobs failed. @containers/packit-build please check. Everyone else, feel free to ignore.
[NON-BLOCKING] Packit jobs failed. @containers/packit-build please check. Everyone else, feel free to ignore.

I think this is good to go. Instead of bumping podman-next priority, I only removed the priority from testing-farm repo. Both cockpit and podman jobs show the expected rpms. 
```
crun-1.25-1.20251107133746032335.main.1.g993ad9d5.fc44.x86_64
podman-6.0.0~dev-1.20251113184257723481.pr27488.1942.b87b73eb1c.fc44.x86_64
```

PTAL. 

I'll keep this in draft until we merge https://github.com/containers/podman/pull/27271 

EDIT: For upstream TMT jobs, I've included a `--disable-repo=testing-farm-tag-repository` in the dnf update step which worked more reliably than removing priority.

@martinpitt the dependencies used look alright now. PTAL. 

@containers/podman-maintainers PTAL.
@containers/podman-maintainers @martinpitt PTAL. This should be good for merge. The intended rpms are being used in the cockpit and podman TMT tests
